endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/api-version-sets
endpoints.description: Lists a collection of API Version Sets in the specified service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/api-version-sets/{versionSetId}
endpoints.description: Gets the details of the Api Version Set specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{VERSIONSETID}} with a real versionsetid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/api-version-sets/{versionSetId}
endpoints.description: Creates or Updates a Api Version Set.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{VERSIONSETID}} with a real versionsetid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/api-version-sets/{versionSetId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{VERSIONSETID}} with a real versionsetid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/api-version-sets/{versionSetId}
endpoints.description: Updates the details of the Api VersionSet specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{VERSIONSETID}} with a real versionsetid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: HEAD /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/api-version-sets/{versionSetId}
endpoints.description: Gets the entity state (Etag) version of the Api Version Set specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{VERSIONSETID}} with a real versionsetid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
